design_philosophy.visual_style: Deep Navy/Black backgrounds with glowing Mint/Cyan accents. High contrast text. Glassmorphism for overlays. Subtle animated borders.

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: A glowing cyan border that animates around the active card or section.
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(45,212,191,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 border border-slate-700/50 rounded-lg font-medium px-6 py-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 hover:text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg text-slate-100 placeholder:text-slate-600

layout_strategies.dashboard: Grid layout with fixed sidebar (collapsible on mobile) and scrollable main content area. Max-width constraint for readability on wiki pages.
layout_strategies.wiki_page: Center-aligned content column (max-w-3xl) with floating Table of Contents on the right (desktop only).
layout_strategies.login: Split screen: Left side interactive abstract 3D/Gradient, Right side form. Or Centered Glass Card on animated background.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}

universal_guidelines: Use 'framer-motion' for all entrances and interactions.
Implement 'Role-Based Access Control' (RBAC) in the UI - hide 'Edit' buttons for Viewers.
Use 'tiptap' or 'react-quill' for the Rich Text Editor. Customize the toolbar to match the dark theme.
AI Chat must feel like a helper, not an intruder. Use a floating action button or a dedicated sidebar tab.
Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standard).
Do NOT use gradients for text to ensure readability.
Navigation links must have active states with a glowing left border or background tint.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Topbar.
3. Implement the Auth Context to manage JWT and User Roles.
4. Build the Wiki Tree navigation component with recursive rendering for subcategories.
5. Create the 'RichTextEditor' component with a custom toolbar.
6. Keep helper UI contextual and non-intrusive.
7. Ensure the Dashboard shows 'Recent Updates' and 'Quick Links'.
8. Use the defined color palette variables in 'tailwind.config.js' (extend theme).
